question.text: Within how many days from the year end must AIFs provide annual reports to investors?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** AIF shall provide at least on an annual basis, within 180 days from the year end, reports to investors. **The Trap:** 60 days is the quarterly reporting deadline for Category III AIFs, not the annual deadline. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Category III AIFs have additional quarterly reporting within 60 days of quarter end.
